title: Fix FeedbackAlignmentTimeline report execution and bucket selection defaults
description: Investigate and fix two observed problems while demoing FeedbackAlignmentTimeline: (1) report runs that execute in remote worker path fail with class-not-found, and (2) local runs can show zero buckets / no data due bucket parameter handling or period completeness defaults. Ensure local demo path is reliable and produce a report with visible data for review.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting triage. Confirmed class exists in local registry code, so class-not-found appears to be execution-path mismatch (remote worker without new block). Next: inspect timeline bucket-generation logic and parameter parsing to explain 0-bucket local output, then patch for safe defaults and robust parsing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Patched dashboard/components/blocks/FeedbackAlignmentTimeline.tsx to handle compacted output correctly in UI: added explicit loading state while output_attachment is being fetched and an explicit attachment-load error state if fetch fails. This removes the misleading fallback UI that previously showed 'Buckets: 0 x trailing_7d' and 'No bucketed alignment data' before attachment data arrived. Validation: npx tsc --noEmit (dashboard) passes. ESLint run failed in this env due AJV/eslintrc runtime issue (TypeError: Cannot set properties of undefined setting defaultMeta). Generated fresh local demo report with inline output (REPORT_BLOCK_ATTACH_OUTPUT_JSON_ALWAYS=0) to verify non-empty timeline data: report_id 4743d2ba-a4b5-4cbc-857e-326e44770ba1, task_id 573f8585-c464-4294-a87e-534aca890a1d, URL https://plexus.anth.us/lab/reports/4743d2ba-a4b5-4cbc-857e-326e44770ba1 .

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User found chart contrast issue: timeline data exists but is hard to see due low contrast/muted chart presentation. Implementing UI contrast improvements in FeedbackAlignmentTimeline block (chart background, axis/grid/tick styling, and line visibility) and validating with typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented requested timeline chart UX refinements in dashboard/components/blocks/FeedbackAlignmentTimeline.tsx: removed chart border/outline; switched visualization to AC1-only (removed right 0-100% axis and removed accuracy line/tooltip field); increased left/right chart margins and added X-axis padding to prevent first/last buckets from touching Y-axes; changed line to explicit connected AC1 line with custom dot renderer where dot radius scales with item_count; added user feedback when switching selector series (temporary 'Loading <series>...' state). Also added caption clarifying dot-size semantics. Validation: dashboard typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Additional UX refinement: when a selected series has bucket rows but no non-null AC1 values, the block now shows an explicit message ('No AC1 data is available for this series in the selected buckets.') instead of a visually blank chart.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User reports chart currently renders dots without connecting line segments. Adjusting AC1 line rendering to connect across null buckets so visible line path connects available points; will re-run dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applied line-connection fix in FeedbackAlignmentTimeline: AC1 line now uses connectNulls=true so dots are connected across null buckets. Validation: dashboard typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Follow-up line visibility fix: switched AC1 line to explicit linear path with isAnimationActive=false and direct hsl(var(--primary)) stroke/fill, while keeping connectNulls enabled. Added explicit note when the selected series has only one non-null AC1 bucket (no segment can be drawn). This clarifies apparent 'dots-only' cases without requiring report rerun. Validation: dashboard npx tsc --noEmit passes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented hard line-visibility fix for FeedbackAlignmentTimeline: added a dedicated AC1 line layer (dot=false) with explicit hex stroke (#2563eb), plus separate transparent stroke point layer for variable-size dots. This avoids CSS/theme variable interactions that could hide line strokes while keeping item-count-scaled dots. Validation: dashboard typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Addressing axis overlap report: adjust chart layout so Y-axis is visually left-aligned while first bucket is offset farther right. Plan: reduce LineChart left margin and increase X-axis horizontal padding to prevent leftmost dot/bucket from overlapping Y-axis labels/axis line. Frontend-only change; no report rerun needed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusted axis/data spacing in FeedbackAlignmentTimeline to fix left-edge overlap: LineChart margin changed to left=4,right=20 (axis appears less inset), and XAxis padding increased to left=44,right=28 so first/last buckets stay clear of Y-axis area. Validation: dashboard npx tsc --noEmit passes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User requested parity with EvaluationTask AC1 gauge segments/colors. Implementing horizontal background bands in FeedbackAlignmentTimeline chart using the same AC1 value boundaries and color tokens as EvaluationTask.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented AC1 background bands in FeedbackAlignmentTimeline using the same segment thresholds/colors as EvaluationTask gauge via shared ac1GaugeSegments import. Added Recharts ReferenceArea bands mapped from gauge percent space (0..100) to AC1 value space (-1..1): [-1,0], [0,0.2], [0.2,0.5], [0.5,0.8], [0.8,1.0], with fillOpacity 0.22. Validation: dashboard typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Per user request, removed left-side chart offset in FeedbackAlignmentTimeline: LineChart left margin set to 0 and XAxis left padding set to 0 so Y-axis is no longer shifted right by added spacing.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User hit Next 15 runtime error on /lab/reports/[id]: params is now Promise-backed and cannot be accessed synchronously. Fixing app/lab/reports/[id]/page.tsx to async-await params; also inspecting route metadata/viewport exports for warning cleanup.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Resolved Next 15 sync dynamic params runtime errors for report routes. Updated server pages to await Promise-backed params: app/lab/reports/[id]/page.tsx and app/lab/reports/edit/[id]/page.tsx now use async functions with awaited params id. Also cleaned root metadata warnings by removing deprecated metadata.viewport field from app/layout.tsx and adding metadataBase (NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL fallback https://plexus.anth.us). Validation: dashboard typecheck passes (npx tsc --noEmit).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Generated user-requested demo report for Selectquote - MEL HRA v1.0 (external_id 1461) using fixed FeedbackAlignmentTimeline config: bucket_type=calendar_month, bucket_count=12, timezone=America/New_York, all scores on scorecard. Report ID: 8421c715-8243-4f7b-b2f8-b25b8d345273. URL: https://plexus.anth.us/lab/reports/8421c715-8243-4f7b-b2f8-b25b8d345273

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: User requested chart-domain tweak: set AC1 y-axis floor to 0 when all visible points are >=0; fall back to -1 only when any point is <0. Implementing in FeedbackAlignmentTimeline renderer and validating with dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented AC1 dynamic y-axis floor in dashboard/components/blocks/FeedbackAlignmentTimeline.tsx: floor now resolves to 0 when selected series has no negative AC1 points and to -1 when any point is negative (ac1YAxisFloor/ac1YAxisDomain). Also changed ReferenceArea ifOverflow from extendDomain to hidden so background bands no longer force domain expansion back below 0. Validation: npx tsc --noEmit (dashboard) passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Committed and pushed branch updates (commit 4965dd10) including dashboard/report changes and project/ Kanbus artifacts. Opened PR into develop: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/159 with semantic release comments including feat entries and validation results.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing approved UI enhancements for FeedbackAlignmentTimeline: add intro paragraph, add collapsed Bucket Details accordion with per-bucket AC1+Accuracy gauges and RawAgreementBar for selected series, include explicit no-data state per bucket, and update story/doc examples accordingly. Will validate with dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented timeline intro + expandable per-bucket details UI. Updated dashboard/components/blocks/FeedbackAlignmentTimeline.tsx to add intro paragraph, Bucket Details accordion (collapsed by default), selected-series bucket rows with AC1 gauge, Accuracy gauge, RawAgreementBar, and explicit no-data bucket messaging. Updated story docs text in dashboard/stories/blocks/FeedbackAlignmentTimeline.stories.tsx and docs page copy/panel in dashboard/app/documentation/report-blocks/feedback-alignment-timeline/page.tsx. Validation: cd dashboard && npx tsc --noEmit passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applying UX adjustment per user review: remove collapsible behavior for bucket gauge details and render always-visible ordered list; remove border/outline from individual bucket cards in FeedbackAlignmentTimeline UI; update docs/story wording to match; validate with dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusted per user feedback: Bucket Details is no longer collapsible and now renders as always-visible ordered rows. Removed border/outline styling from each bucket row card (now rounded bg-card only). Updated story/docs wording from 'collapsed accordion' to always-visible list. Validation: cd dashboard && npx tsc --noEmit passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applying label tweak: change bucket gauge title from 'AC1' to 'Alignment' in FeedbackAlignmentTimeline details list and re-run dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Done: changed per-bucket AC1 gauge title to 'Alignment' in dashboard/components/blocks/FeedbackAlignmentTimeline.tsx. Validation: cd dashboard && npx tsc --noEmit passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Pushed commit 4ba5990e to feature/feedback-alignment-timeline-review, CI run 24261093233 passed (storybook, dashboard unit tests, python 3.11/3.12), and PR to develop is open at https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/159.
